top_signals.title: Oil Set for 19% Collapse in May as Traders Bet On Truce Renewal
top_signals.summary: Oil fell as the US and Iran tentatively agreed to extend a ceasefire by 60 days, with Brent set for the biggest monthly drop since 2020 on optimism that flows through the Strait of Hormuz may resume.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bernstein Sets Long-Term Oil Price Target At $75 Per Barrel
top_signals.summary: Wall Street analyst Bernstein Research has established $75 per barrel as a reasonable long-term oil price target for equity valuations, pointing to rising marginal costs and declining reserves. Citing a new survey of the 50 largest energy companies globally, Bernstein analyst Neil Beveridge has revealed that higher spot prices and a tightening physical market continue to feed inflation back into the supply chain. This will negatively impact production costs, with the global marginal cost of oil now projected to climb to $77 per barrel, after declining…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: BYD's new 4-nm self-driving chip fails to dispel investors' growth concerns
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid-based prop trading platform Hypernova raises $3 million in pre-seed funding
top_signals.summary: Hyperliquid-based prop trading platform Hypernova says it offers "instant payouts" and plans to publicly launch within the next two months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
